headline: Exelon (EXC) Price Target Lowered at TD Cowen Despite Strong Q1
summary: Exelon Corporation (NASDAQ:EXC) is included among the Top 12 Undervalued Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. Exelon Corporation (NASDAQ:EXC) is one of the country’s largest utility companies, serving more than 10 million customers through six fully regulated transmission and distribution utilities. On May 15, TD Cowen trimmed its price target on Exelon Corporation (NASDAQ:EXC) from $51 […]
